sys_ux_page_property.name: chrome_footer

sys_update_version.name: sys_ux_page_property_882e2bd1e0218f14f7aa28f70ed15899
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_ux_page_property"><sys_ux_page_property action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description/><name>chrome_footer</name><page display_value="">c82e2bd12e218f1478d06aada7828a8d</page><required_translations>[]</required_translations><route/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_ux_page_property</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-17 17:19:24</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>882e2bd1e0218f14f7aa28f70ed15899</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>chrome_footer</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Metro Ticket Booking" source="x_1877508_metro_0">b68293e093adc714aca0f55a7bba1037</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Metro Ticket Booking">b68293e093adc714aca0f55a7bba1037</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_page_property_882e2bd1e0218f14f7aa28f70ed15899</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-17 17:19:24</sys_updated_on><type>json</type><unique_name>x_1877508_metro_0.c82e2bd12e218f1478d06aada7828a8d.root.chrome_footer</unique_name><value>{
    "public_page":{
       "enable_footer_topbar":false,
       "footer_topbar_options":{
          "enable_logo":false,
          "enable_address": false,
          "enable_linkset_group":false,
          "max_linkset_count":0
       },
       "enable_footer_bar":true,
       "footer_bar_options":{
          "enable_links":true,
          "max_links_count":5,
          "enable_social_links":false,
          "max_social_links_count":7,
          "social_links":[],
          "enable_copyright_text":true,
          "copyright_text":"© 2026 Company Inc. All rights reserved."
       }
    }
 }</value></sys_ux_page_property></record_update>
